rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when describing interface behavior
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use valid visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, constants, and assignments
Ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the current scope
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation annexes when describing interface behavior
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit exposure
